name: asana
description: Reads Asana workspaces, projects, tasks, sections, tags, stories, users, teams, custom fields, project statuses, and team/workspace memberships through the Asana v1 REST API. Writes task/project/section/tag create-update-delete and task comments.

risk.read: external Asana API read of workspace, project, task, and PM metadata
risk.write: external mutations: creates/updates/deletes tasks, projects, sections, and tags, and posts task comments
risk.approval: required for every write action; deletes are flagged destructive/irreversible in writes.json's per-action risk field
